description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Traits CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest for multiple JSON libraries, including danielaparker-jsoncons, boost-json, nlohmann-json, kazuho-picojson, and open-source-parsers-jsoncpp. For each library, check out the repository, install CMake, build and install the library, run tests, and update badges based on success or failure.
